title: Felipe VI of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Felipe VI is King of Spain, having reigned since 19 June 2014.

title: Charles V becomes king of Spain
fact: Charles V was Holy Roman Emperor and Archduke of Austria from 1519 to 1556, King of Spain from 1516 to 1556, King of Sicily and Naples from 1516 to 1554, and also Lord of the Netherlands and titular Duke of Burgundy from 1506 to 1555.

title: Charles II of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Charles II was the king of Spain from 1665 to 1700.

title: Juan Carlos I of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Juan Carlos I is a member of the Spanish royal family who reigned as King of Spain from 22 November 1975 until his abdication on 19 June 2014.

title: Philip II of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Philip II, sometimes known in Spain as Philip the Prudent, was King of Spain from 1556, King of Portugal from 1580, and King of Naples and Sicily from 1554 until his death in 1598.

title: Alfonso XIII becomes king of Spain
fact: Alfonso XIII, also known as El Africano or the African for his Africanist views, was King of Spain from his birth until 14 April 1931, when the Second Spanish Republic was proclaimed.

title: Philip V of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Philip V was king of Spain from 1 November 1700 to 14 January 1724 and again from 6 September 1724 to his death in 1746.

title: Philip IV of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Philip IV, also called the Planet King, was King of Spain from 1621 to his death and King of Portugal from 1621 to 1640.

title: Ferdinand VII of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Ferdinand VII was King of Spain during the early 19th century.

title: Charles III of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Charles III was King of Spain from 1759 until his death in 1788.

title: Joseph Bonaparte becomes king of Spain
fact: Joseph Bonaparte, regnal name Joseph I, was a French statesman, lawyer, diplomat and older brother of Napoleon Bonaparte.

title: Charles IV of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Charles IV was King of Spain and ruler of the Spanish Empire from 1788 to 1808.

title: Philip III of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Philip III was King of Spain and Portugal during the period known as the Iberian Union, reigning from 1598 until his death in 1621.

title: Isabella II of Spain becomes queen of Spain
fact: Isabella II was Queen of Spain from 1833 until her deposition in 1868.

title: Alfonso XII of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Alfonso XII, also known as El Pacificador, was King of Spain from 29 December 1874 to his death in 1885.

title: Ferdinand VI of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Ferdinand VI, called the Learned and the Just, was King of Spain from 9 July 1746 until his death in 1759.

title: Amadeo I of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Amadeo I, also known as Amadeus, was an Italian prince who reigned as King of Spain from 1870 to 1873.

title: Louis I of Spain becomes king of Spain
fact: Louis I was King of Spain from 15 January 1724 until his death in August the same year.
